parameters.content:
## Workflow C — Stats + Alerting (Discord)

**Trigger:** Schedule Trigger every 30 minutes

**Purpose:** Posts a full stats digest to #gamers-lab-monitor every 30 minutes regardless of pass/fail. Also dead-pipeline detection.

**Flow:**
Alert schedule (30min) → Check status (Postgres) → Build report (Code node) → Send report (Discord Bot)

**Discord message format:**
```
✅ GamersLab Monitor — 30 min report
62/66 checks passed · avg 147ms · last run 12:54 pm

🟢 us-east — 100% · 152ms
🟢 eu-west — 100% · 144ms
🟢 ap-southeast — 100% · 168ms
🟡 sa-east — 73% · 119ms
🟡 me-south — 91% · 125ms
🟢 af-south — 100% · 175ms
```

**Alert levels:**
- 💀 Pipeline dead: total=0 in last 30min → posts dead alert + GitHub Actions link
- 🚨 Critical: 3+ failures
- ⚠️ Warning: 1–2 failures
- ✅ Healthy: all passed — still posts the stats digest

parameters.query:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 1) AS ok_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 0) AS failure_count,
  COUNT(*) AS total_count,
  ROUND(AVG(ttfb_ms)::numeric, 0) AS avg_ttfb,
  MAX(checked_at) AS last_seen,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mode = 'surge') AS surge_count,
  json_agg(json_build_object('region', region, 'ok', CASE WHEN status=1 THEN true ELSE false END, 'ttfb', ttfb_ms) ORDER BY checked_at DESC) AS recent
FROM monitor_results
WHERE checked_at > now() - interval '30 minutes'
